mapper.sql: deviceId, deviceNo, deviceName, proxyId, deviceImgUrl, storeId, storeAddressId, proxyName, autoPay, phone, devicePrice, imei, addressDetail, addressId, status, inventory, onLineTime, fitCardId, createTime,buyCount,validity,storeAddrIds,type,useCount,nextPrice,nextPriceTitle,nextPrice2 ,nextPriceTitle2,nextPrice3,nextPriceTitle3,validityDate
mapper.insert: insert into device (deviceId, deviceNo, deviceName, proxyId, deviceImgUrl, storeId, storeAddressId, proxyName, phone, devicePrice, imei, addressDetail, addressId, status, inventory, onLineTime, createTime,type,storeAddrIds,useCount,nextPrice,nextPriceTitle,nextPrice2 ,nextPriceTitle2,nextPrice3,nextPriceTitle3 ,usedCount,buyCount,validity,validityDate) values (#{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deviceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deviceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{proxyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deviceImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storeAddressId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{proxyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{devicePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{imei,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addressDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addressId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{inventory,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{onLineTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} , #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER} , #{storeAddrIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useCount,jdbcType=INTEGER} , #{nextPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{nextPriceTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nextPrice2,jdbcType=DECIMAL} , #{nextPriceTitle2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nextPrice3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{nextPriceTitle3,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{usedCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{validity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{validityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

insert into device
deviceId,
deviceNo,
deviceName,
proxyId,
deviceImgUrl,
storeId,
storeAddressId,
proxyName,
phone,
devicePrice,
imei,
addressDetail,
addressId,
status,
inventory,
type,
validityDate,
onLineTime,
createTime,
fitCardId,
autoPay,
selecteFree,
storeAddrIds,
nextPrice,
nextPriceTitle,
nextPrice2,
nextPriceTitle2,
nextPrice3,
nextPriceTitle3,
useCount,
buyCount,
validity,

mapper.update:
update device
deviceNo = #{deviceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deviceName = #{deviceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
proxyId = #{proxyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
deviceImgUrl = #{deviceImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
storeAddressId = #{storeAddressId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
proxyName = #{proxyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
devicePrice = #{devicePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
imei = #{imei,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addressDetail = #{addressDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addressId = #{addressId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
inventory = #{inventory,jdbcType=INTEGER},
validityDate = #{validityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
onLineTime = #{onLineTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
fitCardId = #{fitCardId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
autoPay = #{autoPay,jdbcType=INTEGER},
selecteFree = #{selecteFree,jdbcType=INTEGER},
storeAddrIds = #{storeAddrIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
useCount = #{useCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
nextPrice = #{nextPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
nextPriceTitle = #{nextPriceTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nextPrice2 = #{nextPrice2,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
nextPriceTitle2 = #{nextPriceTitle2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nextPrice3 = #{nextPrice3,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
nextPriceTitle3 = #{nextPriceTitle3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
buyCount = #{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
validity = #{validity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where deviceId = #{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select count(*) from device d where d.proxyId=#{userId} and d.status in (0,1) and date_format(d.validityDate, '%Y-%m-%d') >= date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d')
select count(*) from device d where d.proxyId=#{userId} and d.status in (0,1) and date_format(d.validityDate, '%Y-%m-%d') >= date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d')
select count(*) from device where proxyId=#{userId} and deviceNo=#{deviceNo} and status in (2,3,4,5)
mapper.update: update device set inOutNum = IFNULL(inOutNum, 0) + 1 where proxyId = #{userId} and status in (0,1) and date_format(validityDate, '%Y-%m-%d') >= date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d') and storeId = (select s.storeId from store_device s where s.deviceNo=#{deviceNo} limit 1) ORDER BY deviceId DESC limit 1
mapper.select: select * from device where proxyId = #{userId} and status in (0,1) and date_format(validityDate, '%Y-%m-%d') >= date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY deviceId DESC limit 1
select * from device where proxyId=#{userId} and storeAddressId=#{storeAddressId}

select * from device where autoPay > 0 AND status in (0,1) AND date_format(validityDate, '%Y-%m-%d') <= date_format(date_add(now(),INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d')
AND proxyId NOT IN ( SELECT userId FROM card_order WHERE autoPay > 0 AND userId IS NOT NULL AND createdDate > date_format(date_add(now(),INTERVAL -2 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') ) AND proxyId IN ( SELECT userId FROM user_info WHERE wtState=1 and auditStatus=1 ) ORDER BY deviceId DESC
SELECT proxyId FROM device WHERE proxyId = #{userId} and status in (0, 1) and date_format(validityDate, '%Y-%m-%d') >= date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY deviceId DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM device WHERE proxyId = #{userId} and status in (0, 1) and date_format(validityDate, '%Y-%m-%d') >= date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY deviceId DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM device WHERE proxyId = #{userId} ORDER BY deviceId DESC LIMIT 1
